description_long: This is a sleek, modern laptop with a dark metallic finish and a minimalist design. The front features a large, high-resolution screen displaying a website, surrounded by thin bezels. The keyboard is compact, with black keys and a large trackpad, and the hinge mechanism is slim and streamlined. The back of the device displays a prominent, polished Apple logo centered on the lid. The laptop appears to be constructed primarily from metal, likely aluminum, with some plastic and glass components. Its overall appearance is professional and high-end, suitable for use in urban environments such as cafes, offices, or public workspaces.
description: A modern, dark metallic laptop with a large screen, black keyboard, and a prominent Apple logo on the back. The design is sleek and professional, with a minimalist aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen displaying a website, black keyboard, and large trackpad.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile, slim hinge, and partially visible screen and keyboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dark metallic lid with a centered, polished Apple logo.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thinness of the device and the open screen.
attribute_brand_logo: A polished Apple logo is visible, centered on the back of the laptop lid. The logo is a simple, stylized apple shape with a bite taken out of the right side.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a website with various images and interface elements.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard layout is QWERTY, featuring a function row at the top and a large trackpad below. No numeric keypad is present.
